channel.title: FXNewsBias Daily Insights
channel.description: Daily forex market insights focused on the highest-impact news and what traders should watch next.

item.title: USD Rallies to 101.00 on Fed Rate Hikes & Yen Weakness
item.description: London is opening — here is the forex sentiment setup heading into the European session. US Dollar (USD) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.

item.title: JPY Rallies on Weak US NFP & Carry-Unwind, EUR/JPY Vulnerable
item.description: Asia session is opening — here is the overnight forex sentiment picture as Tokyo, Singapore and Sydney desks come online. Japanese Yen (JPY) leads forex sentiment today with a strong bullish reading. Here is what drove the move and what to watch next.
